Hyprlock Config

Wayland-native lockscreen, themed via the engine.

PLANTED · 27 APRIL 2026 · ZETTEL NOTE

Lock screen. Wayland-native, themed via Theme Engine.

Palette

  • amber #c86820
  • teal #28a8a0
  • dark #0a0804

File

hypr/.config/hypr/hyprlock.conf

Trigger

Called by Hypridle Config on idle threshold.
